name: Judges Scientific
confidenceReason: UK-based buyer of specialized scientific instrument manufacturers. Incredible return on capital.
bullCase: Judges Scientific is a UK niche scientific instrument serial acquirer with 20%+ historical ROE and a proven capital allocation model. A 24x exit P/E represents fair value for an asset-light compounder with recurring aftermarket revenue and a deep pipeline of sub-£50M acquisition targets.
bearCase: UK domicile adds currency risk (GBP/USD) and limits the acquisition pipeline vs. North American peers. Multiple compression from current 35x levels to 24x base would produce modest returns unless EPS growth exceeds 16%.
description: Judges Scientific plc designs, manufactures, and sells scientific instruments and services.
